_comment: The public seed. Safe stuff only — milestones, builds, wins. The real archive (the heavy years) lives in data/memories.local.json which is gitignored and loads OVER the top of this. Add nodes by hand: each one needs id, date, title, body, tag. That's it.

nodes.title: TAFE Cert IV — done
nodes.body: Eighteen weeks of IT programming, finished. C#, web, SQL. The credential layer. Not the destination, the key that unlocks the door.

nodes.title: RADON FID pipeline
nodes.body: DXF sanitiser, MAGNET CSV scraper, offset calculators, a find-and-replace LISP doing the work of an afternoon in one keystroke. Surveying drudgery, automated. First real tool that earned its keep.

nodes.title: Cloned my own face
nodes.body: Trained an SDXL LoRA on myself on a RunPod 3090. Typed a prompt, my face came back out of the noise. First time the machine could draw me from nothing.

nodes.title: Cloned my own voice
nodes.body: ElevenLabs voice clone wired into TalkyTalk and SERVITOR. The bot stopped sounding like a robot and started sounding like me. Uncanny the first time it spoke.

nodes.title: SERVITOR woke up
nodes.body: A Discord agent that takes on any personality on command and talks in my voice. The machine spirit got a mouth. Replaced the old mrrobot rig entirely.

nodes.title: RADON return — handshake locked
nodes.body: Four days a week, drafter/technician, with Raed. 'I want a companion. Someone to entertain me but get the work done.' Not theoretical anymore. The path made real.

nodes.title: Neural net of myself
nodes.body: Built a Node.js neural network modelled on me, to change theatres when the boredom hit. Another organ of the twin, built and set down.

nodes.title: Gave the ghost hands
nodes.body: MediaPipe hand-tracking plus three.js. The fragments — the face, the voice, the agent, the memory — finally get a body you can reach into. This thing. The one you're standing in right now.
